name: Subhashini Srinivasan
body: Subhashini is a Senior Technical Architect at eGov Foundation, architecting digital public goods platforms at population scale, including the technology behind PUCAR's court work. She spent eight years as software lead for the Karnataka Learning Partnership at Akshara Foundation, building open-source tools to visualise public education data. She is an expert in national-scale open-source platforms for public service delivery.
